---
title: "DE4W26 – Data Engineering for Wearables"
---

Tutorial sessions, supportive to the moodle course.

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| 2026-04-14 | tbd |
| 2026-04-21 | tbd |
| 2026-04-28 | Python, R, IDE, installation: [slides](3_software.html), [guide](3_installation.html) |
| 2026-05-05 | git + quarto: [slides](4_publishing.html), [homework](4_practice.html) |
| 2026-05-12 | practical git + markdown usage, data science pipeline |
| 2026-05-19 | tbd |
